scripts.deploy: pnpm --filter @licsign/admin build && pnpm db:migrate:remote && wrangler deploy --config worker/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply license_service --local --config worker/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply license_service --remote --config worker/wrangler.jsonc
